list.title: Roles & permissions
list.subtitle: Configure roles and access per screen and action.

detail.systemNote: This is a system role. You can edit its permissions, but it cannot be renamed or deleted.
detail.emptyDescription: Pick a role from the list on the left to view and configure its permissions.

descriptions.super_admin: Full control over system configuration and permissions
descriptions.payroll_approver: Approves pay runs submitted by HR (Director/Chief Accountant)
descriptions.manager: View information and approve for the managed team

form.createDescription: Name the role and choose the permissions for this custom role.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of this role's scope

delete.title: Delete role?
delete.description: The role "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete.hasUsers: Cannot delete "{{name}}" because {{count}} users are assigned to it. Move them to another role first.

toast.createErrorDescription: The role name may already exist. Please try again.
